privileged_info_summary: This task requires cataloging three well-known machine learning papers in a Zotero library by adding arXiv metadata. All three papers are real, published on arXiv: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017, arXiv 1706.03762), (2) 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' (Devlin et al., 2018, arXiv 1810.04805), and (3) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014, arXiv 1406.2661). The task data is synthetic—papers are seeded into a local Zotero database via seed_library.py with hardcoded metadata—but the expected arXiv IDs and library catalog values all correspond to actual papers on arXiv.org.
